app.name: Locali11y
app.tagline: Find the accessibility your translations broke.

hero.title: Your website is accessible in English.
hero.subtitle: Locali11y audits accessibility across every language version of your site. Find untranslated ARIA labels, missing alt text, and broken locale attributes — before your users do.

comparative.title: Comparative Audit
comparative.description: Checks 20 accessibility attributes across every locale and compares them to your source language. Finds issues that only exist in translated versions.

localeSpecific.title: Locale-Specific Issues
localeSpecific.description: Identifies ARIA labels left in English, alt text never translated, page titles unchanged, and form labels missing in non-English versions.

fixes.title: Fix Suggestions
fixes.description: Generates translation fix suggestions for every locale-specific issue. Export as JSON and paste into your locale files.

compliance.title: EU Accessibility Act Ready
compliance.description: The European Accessibility Act (2025) requires accessible digital products across all supported languages. Locali11y helps you comply.

step1.title: Paste Your URL
step1.description: Enter any multilingual website URL. Locali11y auto-detects available language versions.

step2.title: Run the Audit
step2.description: 20 targeted accessibility checks run across every locale. Results compared against your source language.

step3.title: Fix What's Broken
step3.description: See exactly which elements are broken in which languages. Get fix suggestions and export them as JSON.

stats.checksDesc: Targeted at the i18n × a11y intersection

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your accessibility audits across locales
dashboard.noAuditsDescription: Run your first audit to see how accessible your multilingual site really is.

new.title: New Accessibility Audit
new.subtitle: Enter a multilingual website URL to audit accessibility across locales
new.runningDescription: Fetching pages and running 20 accessibility checks across locales. This usually takes 10-30 seconds.
new.noLocalesDetected: No alternate locales detected. You can add them manually.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL starting with https://
errors.noLocales: Please select at least one target locale
errors.fetchFailed: Could not fetch the URL. Please check it's accessible.

results.title: Audit Results
results.subtitle: Accessibility comparison across locales
results.localeSpecificDescription: Issues that exist only in translated versions, not in the source language
results.noIssues: No issues found for this locale

html-lang-present.title: HTML lang attribute
html-lang-present.description: Checks if the <html> tag has a lang attribute matching the page locale
html-lang-present.failureDescription: The <html> tag is missing or has an incorrect lang attribute for this locale
html-lang-present.fixRecommendation: Set the lang attribute on <html> to match the page locale

hreflang-tags.title: Hreflang alternate links
hreflang-tags.description: Checks for <link rel="alternate" hreflang> tags linking to other language versions
hreflang-tags.failureDescription: Missing hreflang tags for alternate language versions
hreflang-tags.fixRecommendation: Add <link rel="alternate" hreflang="{locale}" href="{url}"> for each locale

img-alt-present.title: Image alt text present
img-alt-present.description: Checks that all tags have non-empty alt attributes
img-alt-present.failureDescription: One or more images are missing alt text
img-alt-present.fixRecommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images

img-alt-translated.title: Image alt text translated
img-alt-translated.description: Compares alt text with the source locale to detect untranslated alt attributes
img-alt-translated.failureDescription: Image alt text appears to be copied from the source locale without translation
img-alt-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate the alt text to match this locale

aria-label-present.title: ARIA labels present
aria-label-present.description: Checks that elements with aria-label have non-empty values
aria-label-present.failureDescription: One or more elements have empty aria-label attributes
aria-label-present.fixRecommendation: Add translated aria-label values for screen reader users

aria-label-translated.title: ARIA labels translated
aria-label-translated.description: Compares aria-label values with the source locale to detect untranslated labels
aria-label-translated.failureDescription: ARIA labels appear to be left in the source language without translation
aria-label-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate all aria-label values to match this locale

aria-describedby-valid.title: ARIA describedby targets have content
aria-describedby-valid.description: Checks that elements referenced by aria-describedby exist and have text content
aria-describedby-valid.failureDescription: An aria-describedby reference points to an empty or missing element
aria-describedby-valid.fixRecommendation: Ensure the referenced element has translated text content

title-attr-present.title: Title attributes on links
title-attr-present.description: Checks that links and images with title attributes have non-empty values
title-attr-present.failureDescription: Title attributes are empty on interactive elements

page-title-translated.title: Page title translated
page-title-translated.description: Checks if the <title> tag content differs from the source locale
page-title-translated.failureDescription: The page title appears identical to the source locale
page-title-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate the page <title> tag to match this locale

meta-description-translated.title: Meta description translated
meta-description-translated.description: Checks if the meta description differs from the source locale
meta-description-translated.failureDescription: The meta description appears identical to the source locale
meta-description-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate the meta description for this locale

og-tags-translated.title: Open Graph tags translated
og-tags-translated.description: Checks if og:title and og:description differ from the source locale
og-tags-translated.failureDescription: Open Graph tags appear identical to the source locale
og-tags-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate og:title and og:description for proper social media previews

button-text-present.title: Button text present
button-text-present.description: Checks that all buttons have visible text content or aria-label
button-text-present.failureDescription: One or more buttons have no accessible name
button-text-present.fixRecommendation: Add translated text content or aria-label to all buttons

link-text-present.title: Link text present
link-text-present.description: Checks that all links have visible text content or aria-label
link-text-present.failureDescription: One or more links have no accessible name
link-text-present.fixRecommendation: Add translated text content or aria-label to all links

form-labels-present.title: Form labels associated
form-labels-present.description: Checks that all form inputs have associated <label> elements with text
form-labels-present.failureDescription: One or more form inputs are missing associated labels
form-labels-present.fixRecommendation: Add translated <label> elements for all form inputs

placeholder-translated.title: Placeholder text translated
placeholder-translated.description: Compares placeholder text with the source locale to detect untranslated placeholders
placeholder-translated.failureDescription: Placeholder text appears identical to the source locale
placeholder-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate placeholder text for this locale

dir-attribute.title: Direction attribute correct
dir-attribute.description: Checks that RTL locales have dir="rtl" on the <html> tag
dir-attribute.failureDescription: This RTL locale is missing dir="rtl" on the <html> tag
dir-attribute.fixRecommendation: Add dir="rtl" to the <html> tag for RTL locales

heading-hierarchy.title: Heading hierarchy maintained
heading-hierarchy.description: Checks that heading levels (h1-h6) are in order without skipping levels
heading-hierarchy.failureDescription: Heading hierarchy is broken — levels are skipped
heading-hierarchy.fixRecommendation: Fix heading hierarchy to maintain proper h1 > h2 > h3 order

skip-navigation.title: Skip navigation link
skip-navigation.description: Checks for a skip-to-content link at the top of the page
skip-navigation.fixRecommendation: Add a translated skip-to-content link at the top of the page

empty-interactive.title: No empty interactive elements
empty-interactive.description: Checks that buttons and links are not empty after translation
empty-interactive.failureDescription: Interactive elements have no text content after translation
empty-interactive.fixRecommendation: Add translated text content to all interactive elements

submit-button-translated.title: Submit button translated
submit-button-translated.description: Checks that submit button values are translated
submit-button-translated.failureDescription: Submit button text appears identical to the source locale
submit-button-translated.fixRecommendation: Translate the submit button value for this locale
